info.name: Marketing Strategy Recommender API
info.description: Complete test collection for the AI-powered Marketing Strategy Recommender backend (Phases 1-6)

request.description: Verify the API is running and healthy
Add a platform algorithm update to the knowledge base
Real-world case study for Food & Beverage industry

body.raw:
{
  "business_type": "Cafe",
  "industry": "Food & Beverage",
  "business_size": "micro",
  "business_stage": "growth",
  "location": {
    "city": "Kuala Lumpur",
    "district": "Bangsar",
    "country": "Malaysia"
  },
  "products_services": "Specialty coffee, artisanal pastries, eco-friendly packaging",
  "unique_selling_proposition": "Locally sourced beans, sustainable practices, community-focused",
  "monthly_budget": 1500,
  "has_marketing_team": false,
  "content_creation_capacity": ["photos", "short_videos"],
  "primary_goal": "increase_foot_traffic",
  "secondary_goals": ["build_brand_awareness", "customer_retention"],
  "target_revenue_increase": 30,
  "timeline": "3_months",
  "demographics": {
    "age_range": "25_34",
    "gender": ["all"],
    "income_level": "middle_income",
    "education_level": "university"
  },
  "target_location": "Urban professionals within 5km radius",
  "interests": ["sustainability", "premium_coffee", "local_businesses"],
  "buying_frequency": "weekly",
  "preferred_platforms": ["Instagram", "Facebook", "WhatsApp Business"],
  "current_platforms": ["Instagram", "Facebook"],
  "platform_experience": "intermediate",
  "challenges": ["limited_budget", "content_creation", "competition"],
  "strengths": ["unique_product", "local_partnerships"],
  "opportunities": ["sustainability_trend", "community_events"],
  "competitor_behavior": "Competitors focus heavily on paid ads, less on organic community building",
  "stock_availability": "consistent",
  "seasonality": [
    {
      "category": "weather",
      "subcategories": ["rainy_season_promotions"]
    },
    {
      "category": "festivals",
      "subcategories": ["ramadan_specials", "chinese_new_year"]
    }
  ],
  "additional_notes": "New coffee shops opened nearby in the last 3 months. Need to differentiate through sustainability messaging."
}

request.description: Generate a complete marketing strategy for an urban cafe with full 8-section profile

body.raw:
{
  "business_type": "Retail Store",

request.description: Generate strategy with minimal required fields

body.raw:
{
  "business_type": "Professional Services",
  "industry": "Digital Marketing Agency",
  "business_size": "small",
  "business_stage": "startup",
  "location": {
    "city": "Kuala Lumpur",
    "district": "Mont Kiara",
    "country": "Malaysia"
  },
  "products_services": "Social media management, content creation, paid ads for SMEs",
  "unique_selling_proposition": "Data-driven strategies tailored for Malaysian SMEs with limited budgets",
  "monthly_budget": 2500,
  "has_marketing_team": true,
  "content_creation_capacity": ["photos", "short_videos", "graphics", "articles"],
  "primary_goal": "lead_generation",
  "secondary_goals": ["build_brand_awareness", "thought_leadership"],
  "target_revenue_increase": 50,
  "timeline": "6_months",
  "demographics": {
    "age_range": "35_44",
    "gender": ["all"],
    "income_level": "upper_middle_income",
    "education_level": "university"
  },
  "target_location": "SME owners in Klang Valley",
  "interests": ["business_growth", "digital_transformation"],
  "buying_frequency": "one_time_high_value",
  "preferred_platforms": ["LinkedIn", "Facebook", "Instagram"],
  "current_platforms": ["Facebook", "Instagram"],
  "platform_experience": "advanced",
  "challenges": ["lead_quality", "competition"],
  "strengths": ["expertise", "case_studies"],
  "opportunities": ["sme_digitalization_trend"],
  "competitor_behavior": "Most competitors target large enterprises, leaving SME segment underserved",
  "additional_notes": "Want to establish thought leadership through educational content"
}
